text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And that's all she wrote for the Arima<n>Kinen! Our
all-star lineup today has<n>given us a race that we
won't soon<n>forget!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We're witnessing the Golden<n>Generation being
supplanted by this<n>year's newcomers, led by T.M.
Opera<n>O! What a spectacular event!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! As far as opening acts<n>for a
generational clash go, I suppose<n>this will do.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Spe and Grass... I have observed<n>very well the
footprints of your<n>history with every step you've
taken.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The time is nigh. I, the Overlord, will<n>carry on in
your stead.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In the next year, this competition of<n>ours will be
settled once and for all.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Without question—I humbly accept<n>your challenge.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Really... Opera O, you're so much<n>stronger than I
thought!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And this is just the Classics! Come<n>next year, I
can't even imagine<n>what's gonna happen!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh. It'll be beyond your wildest<n>dreams. I can tell
you that much.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The path of an overlord is<n>never-ending, and I'm
on a journey<n>to become the Centurial Overlord,
ruler of all Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ha ha ha! Haaaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ha—gahagh! Cough! Cough!

Oh no! It appears T.M. Opera O has<n>begun to
choke!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What?! Why is there still<n>commentary?

The star of today's intense<n>competition both
inspires the crowd<n>and brings them to laughter.
Finally,<n>we make our leave from the course.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
With that, my classic year has<n>concluded. I
appreciate your diligent<n>work, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But thus closes this act of the heroic<n>tale of the
young Prince T.M. Opera O.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A new one is to begin in the next year<n>when I will
be a senior.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It shall be an epic, detailing my clash<n>with the older
generation.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: No longer will I seek their counsel<n>through bouts.
choice_data_list:
You never planned to ask for their help in the first
place.

text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha! Excellent point!
I am the Overlord. I was born tohave this role!

If I were to ask for anything, it would<n>be the
money in your wallet. Hah ha<n>ha!

I know that was a joke, but I can't<n>seem to laugh
along.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, Trainer. In order to bring about<n>the
resplendent future in which I rule<n>over the next
generation...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What race would you consider best?<n>Give me the
name of one worthy of<n>the Overlord.

A senior year race in spring comes to<n>mind. In fact,
the choice is obvious.
choice_data_list: How about the spring Tenno Sho?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The spring Tenno Sho! Hark, thebeautiful sound I yearned to hear—theking of all races!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It boasts notoriety and prestige! A<n>majestic
3200-meter parade with the<n>greatest racer at the
helm!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A fitting rite of passage for this new<n>ruler, to be
sure!

It's set. Deciding on a goal for next<n>year was a
breeze.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It's settled. Our march toward victory<n>begins at
next year's spring Tenno<n>Sho!
